ham: Hi Rahul, your SIP of ₹10,000 for the XYZ Mutual Fund has been deducted successfully today. Check the 'SIP Transactions' section in your app. If you need to pause or change the amount, reply YES. Thank you!
spam: 🚨 Urgent Alert 🚨 Apke SBI/HDFC reward points 24 ghante mein expire ho jaayenge! Abhi verify kare at <URL> to save points. Click <URL> ya reply YES. Agar aisa karna nahi chahte to STOP type kare. Dhanyavaad!
